pi_items.verified_value: CONTRADICTED - Actual Chinook database uses uppercase table names: Invoice, Customer, Track. Queries with lowercase table names will fail.
pi_items.source: Tested queries with lowercase names returned 'no such table' error; tested with uppercase names work correctly

pi_items.metadata_value: Task description queries use date range 2010-01-01 to 2012-12-31
pi_items.verified_value: CONTRADICTED - Actual Chinook database has no data in 2010-2012 range. Data dates range from 2021-01-01 to 2025-12-22.
pi_items.source: Direct query: SELECT MIN(InvoiceDate), MAX(InvoiceDate) FROM Invoice returned 2021-01-01|2025-12-22

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, public sample database from GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database) containing a mix of real and synthetic data. Media data (artists, albums, tracks with 3,503 rows) comes from iTunes Library; customer and employee data are synthetic (59 customers, 8 employees); sales data are synthetically generated (412 invoices). The database has the required columns: Invoice.InvoiceDate, Customer.City, Track.Composer, and Track.Milliseconds. However, the actual database uses uppercase table names (Invoice, Customer, Track), while the task description contains SQL queries using lowercase names (invoices, customers, tracks) which will fail. Additionally, the task queries reference dates from 2010-2012, but the actual database contains data from 2021-2025.
